stories.headline: Cursor just shipped a coding agent straight to your phone
stories.blurb: Cursor's new iOS app lets you launch and manage always-on coding agents from anywhere. Available now in public beta for all paid users — meaning you can start a refactor from your couch and check in while you're out.
stories.why_it_matters: Coding agents are no longer desk-bound — you can now kick them off and monitor from mobile.

stories.headline: Open-source coding agent trains itself by fixing its own mistakes
stories.blurb: Ornith-1.0 is a new open-source AI model that improves at writing code by learning from its failures. When it breaks something, it captures the error, figures out what went wrong, and uses that feedback to get better at the task—without human annotation. The team released the model weights and training approach on GitHub.
stories.why_it_matters: Self-improving agents could get better at your codebase the more you use them.
stories.original_headline: Ornith-1.0: self-improving open-source models for agentic coding

stories.headline: Google's Gemini can now make images from your personal data — for free
stories.blurb: Google opened its personalized AI image generator to all US users. Gemini can now pull from your connected Google apps — photos, docs, calendar — to create images that match your interests and history. Previously required a paid subscription.
stories.why_it_matters: Free AI that knows your context makes custom visuals way easier to generate
stories.original_headline: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users

stories.headline: Claude now runs on NVIDIA's newest Blackwell chips in Azure
stories.blurb: Anthropic's Claude models are now generally available in Microsoft Azure running on NVIDIA's GB300 Blackwell Ultra GPUs. Azure customers can now build agents on Claude using NVIDIA's latest hardware without leaving their existing cloud infrastructure.
stories.why_it_matters: Major enterprises can finally use frontier models on cutting-edge chips inside their existing Azure setup.
stories.original_headline: Claude Meets Blackwell Ultra: Anthropic’s Models Now Run on NVIDIA GB300 in Azure

try_this_prompt.title: The reverse roadmap
try_this_prompt.prompt: I'll describe a goal I want to hit in 90 days. Work backwards from success and build me a timeline in reverse: what has to be true the day before I hit it, one week before, one month before, and right now. Then tell me which milestone is actually the long pole.
try_this_prompt.tool_hint: When your plan feels like a list of hopes instead of a sequence of dependencies.

daily_question: What's the first thing you'd build if you could code on your phone as fast as on your laptop?
